zh.Mamble, Cleobury Mortimer, Warwickshire,: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬布爾 煙雨 貝頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Blount I於1298年出生在英國武斯特斯爾索丁頓時，他的父親Walter Blount29歲，母親Johanna Soddington25歲。他於1340年與Iseult Mountjoy在英國德比夏爾艾爾瓦斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1358年3月8日在英國武斯特斯爾馬布爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Blount I于1298年出生在英国武斯特斯爾索丁頓时，他的父亲Walter Blount29岁，母亲Johanna Soddington25岁。他于1340年与Iseult Mountjoy在英国德比夏爾艾爾瓦斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1358年3月8日在英国武斯特斯爾馬布爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Blount I was born in 1298, in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, his father, Walter Blount, was 29 and his mother, Johanna Soddington, was 25. He married Iseult Mountjoy in 1340, in Elvaston, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 March 1358, in Mamble, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Blount I est né en 1298, à Sodington, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Blount, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Johanna Soddington, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Iseult Mountjoy en 1340, à Elvaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 mars 1358, à Mamble, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Blount I 1298 in Sodington, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Blount 29 und seine Mutter Johanna Soddington 25. Er hat 1340 in Elvaston, Derbyshire, England Iseult Mountjoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. März 1358 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Mamble, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Blount I è nato il nel 1298 nel Sodington, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Walter Blount, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Soddington, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Iseult Mountjoy nel 1340, nel Elvaston, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 marzo 1358, nel Mamble, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Blount Iが1298年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアソディントンで生まれた時，父Walter Blountは29歳，母Johanna Soddingtonは25歳であった。1340年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアエルヴァストンでIseult Mountjoyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年3月8日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマンブルで60歳で死去した。

ko.Mamble, Cleobury Mortimer, Warwickshire,: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 맘블일 위스 베이턴
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Blount I(이)가 1298년 영국 워스스터실르 소딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Blount(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Soddington(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1340년 영국 더비실르 엘바스턴에서 Iseult Mountjoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 3월 8일 영국 워스스터실르 맘블일에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Blount I nasceu em 1298, em Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Blount, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Soddington, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Iseult Mountjoy em 1340, em Elvaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de março de 1358, em Mamble, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.Mamble, Cleobury Mortimer, Warwickshire,: мамбл вит беитон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Blount I родился в 1298 г. в местности содингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Blount было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Soddington, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Iseult Mountjoy в 1340 г. в местности элвастон, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 марта 1358 г. в местности мамбл, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Blount I nació en 1298, en Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Blount, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Johanna Soddington, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Iseult Mountjoy en 1340, en Elvaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1358, en Mamble, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
